title: Nikdo nic nevi
writer: Josef Mach, Václav Mírovský, Petr Nedoma
actors: Jaroslav Marvan, Frantisek Filipovský, Eduard Linkers
plot: Only 2 years after the end of WWII, a comedy,with much ingenious clowning,on Nazism in which two Prague street car conductors need to quietly remove a drunken German soldier from the occupied city.
